name: HIPAA Automatic Logoff
description: Ensures automatic logoff is enabled for PHI systems after inactivity (HIPAA 164.312(a)(2)(iii))
query: SELECT id, name, contains_phi, session_timeout_minutes FROM systems WHERE contains_phi = true AND (session_timeout_minutes IS NULL OR session_timeout_minutes > 15)
remediation: Configure automatic session timeout of 15 minutes or less for PHI systems.
